name: Gimbo forest recovery
intervention: Assisted natural regeneration with community protection
summary: Community protection and enrichment planting on degraded forest-edge slopes.

score_history.why_changed: Baseline showed sparse tree cover and high slope risk.
Mock monitoring shows vegetation recovery and reduced bare-soil signal.
Current feature stack gives stronger forest-edge and rainfall context, but field validation is still required.

image_timeline.label: Early recovery
image_timeline.note: More contiguous vegetation in protected gullies.

image_timeline.label: Current mock state
image_timeline.note: Denser canopy pattern in the investment area.

image_timeline.label: Field context
image_timeline.note: Landscape image extracted from AI4goodChallenge.pdf for demo context.

update_note: Needs automatic update when Gimbo source-derived score, NDVI trend, forest context, or local evidence changes.

name: Hamer soil-water works
intervention: Terracing repair, exclosures, and native tree planting
summary: Dryland restoration package focused on erosion control and vegetation recovery.

score_history.why_changed: Baseline dryland context had low vegetation cover and high erosion sensitivity.
Mock vegetation recovery improves implementation story, but source-derived trend data is still pending.

image_timeline.label: Dry baseline
image_timeline.note: Sparse vegetation and exposed soil pattern.

image_timeline.label: Restoration mock
image_timeline.note: Vegetation patches expand around restored terraces.

image_timeline.label: Forest-edge context
image_timeline.note: Landscape image extracted from AI4goodChallenge.pdf for demo context.

update_note: Needs automatic update when regional rainfall, soil, slope, vegetation, or source imagery changes.
